title: VillagerPlus - More Trades - Clutter Coral
description: Addes the Clutter mod's coral variations to the trade options for the Villager Plus mod's Oceanographer.
body:
Based on the existing Oceanographer trades provided by the VillagerPlus mod, this mod adds all of the various coral types from the Clutter mod into the mix. In total, this mod adds 66 new trades to the Oceanographer.

Required Mods:
- [VillagersPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/villagersplus)
- [Clutter](https://modrinth.com/mod/clutter)
